industry_news_cn.title: M&A Monday: Great Northern turns Nevada lease into acquisition - Mining.com.au
industry_news_cn.description: MinRex has acquired 100% of Electrum's shares to combine the companies' portfolios. Meanwhile, Great Northern Minerals (ASX:GNM) has entered a binding exploration lease and option agreement to acquire the Iron Butte Gold-Silver Project in Lander County, Nevada.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 并购周一: Great Northern将内华达租赁转为收购
industry_news_cn.display_title: Great Northern将内华达租赁协议转为资产收购
industry_news_cn.display_desc: MinRex已收购Electrum 100%股份以合并两家公司资产组合。同时,Great Northern Minerals(ASX:GNM)已签订具有约束力的勘探租赁和期权协议,收购位于内华达州兰德县的Iron Butte金银项目。矿业领域的并购活动持续活跃。

industry_news_cn.title: Misr Chemical Industries 9-Month Net Profit EGP 397.4 Million - TradingView
industry_news_cn.description: Misr Chemical Industries reported 9-month net profit of EGP 397.4 million according to TradingView/Reuters.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 埃及化工产业9个月净利润达3.974亿埃镑
industry_news_cn.display_title: 埃及化工产业9个月净利润达3.974亿埃镑
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 据TradingView/Reuters报道,埃及化工产业公司公布截至本季度的9个月财务业绩,实现净利润3.974亿埃及镑。TCL电子预计第一季度调整后利润同比增长125%-150%。

industry_news_cn.title: NIBTT eyes legislation to include self-employed contributors - Trinidad Express Newspapers
industry_news_cn.description: The National Insurance Board of Trinidad and Tobago (NIBTT) is looking at legislation to include self-employed contributors.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 特立尼达和多巴哥国家保险委员会推动立法纳入自雇人士
industry_news_cn.display_title: 特立尼达和多巴哥国家保险委员会推动立法纳入自雇人士
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 特立尼达和多巴哥国家保险委员会(NIBTT)首席运营官Andy Edwards和执行董事Niala Persad-Poliah在议会联合特设委员会上表示,正在推动立法将自雇人士纳入保险贡献体系,以增强制度覆盖面和可持续性。

industry_news_cn.title: IRON Investor News: If You Have Suffered Losses in Disc - GlobeNewswire
industry_news_cn.description: Rosen Law Firm reminds purchasers of securities of Nektar Therapeutics (NASDAQ: NKTR) and investigates potential securities violations.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 投资者维权: Rosen律师事务所调查Nektar Therapeutics证券违规
industry_news_cn.display_title: Rosen律师事务所调查Nektar Therapeutics潜在证券违规行为
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 全球投资者权益律师事务所Rosen Law Firm提醒,在2026年2月26日等特定期间购买Nektar Therapeutics(NASDAQ:NKTR)证券的投资者,该所正在调查潜在的证券违法行为,鼓励受损投资者联系了解自身权利。

industry_news_cn.title: Fire in Malaysia's Sabah destroys 200 homes, hundreds displaced - Reuters
industry_news_cn.description: Hundreds of people have been displaced after a fire destroyed around 200 homes in a coastal village in Malaysia's Sabah state.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 马来西亚沙巴州火灾摧毁200栋房屋,数百人被迫转移
industry_news_cn.display_title: 马来西亚沙巴州沿海村庄火灾致200栋房屋被毁
industry_news_cn.display_desc: 据路透社报道,马来西亚沙巴州一座沿海村庄周日发生大火,约200栋房屋被摧毁,数百名居民被迫转移。此类灾害事件对当地保险和再保险市场具有一定影响。

industry_news_cn.title: 10%-Plus Dividend Yield and Double-Digit Upside: Analysts Recommend 2 Dividend Stocks for Reliable Income - TipRanks
industry_news_cn.description: Analysts recommend 2 dividend stocks with 10%+ yield and double-digit upside, including RMR focused on real estate sector.
industry_news_cn.title_cn: 分析师推荐两只股息率超10%的高收益股票
industry_news_cn.display_title: 分析师推荐两只股息率超10%且具双位数上涨空间的股票
industry_news_cn.display_desc: TipRanks分析师推荐两只兼具高股息和上涨潜力的股票,其中包括专注房地产领域的资产管理公司RMR。该推荐为追求稳定收益的投资者提供了参考,市场关注股息策略的回报表现。

tech_news_cn.title: IPO-bound Acko cuts 5% workforce as AI shift reshapes roles - Mint
tech_news_cn.description: Digital insure-tech firm Acko has let go of about 60 employees, roughly 5% of its workforce, as it undergoes a structural realignment with a greater focus on integrating AI into its operations.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: 即将IPO的保险科技公司Acko裁减5%员工,全面拥抱AI转型
tech_news_cn.display_title: 保险科技Acko裁减5%员工,加速AI驱动业务转型
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 印度数字保险科技公司Acko裁员约60人(占总数5%),进行结构性调整以加速AI融合。该公司正在推进IPO进程,此次裁员反映了保险科技行业在AI浪潮下的组织变革趋势,技术替代传统岗位的步伐加快。

tech_news_cn.title: Trump wants to stop states from regulating AI. This Utah Republican isn't listening - AP News
tech_news_cn.description: Trump wants to stop states from regulating AI, but a Utah Republican with technology background is pushing for state-level AI regulation.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: 特朗普拟禁止各州监管AI,犹他州共和党人持不同立场
tech_news_cn.display_title: 美国AI监管权争夺: 特朗普主张联邦统一,各州仍推动本地立法
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 美国总统特朗普试图阻止各州自行监管人工智能,主张建立联邦统一标准。然而犹他州共和党人Fiefia凭借技术背景,正在推动州级AI监管法案。美国约80%的民众支持AI监管,联邦与州的监管权限之争持续升温。

tech_news_cn.title: Fintech Landscape and Wider Digital Overview of Chile in 2026 - The Fintech Times
tech_news_cn.description: Overview of Chile's fintech ecosystem and digital economic development in 2026.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: 2026年智利金融科技生态及数字经济全景
tech_news_cn.display_title: 2026年智利金融科技生态与数字经济发展全景
tech_news_cn.display_desc: The Fintech Times发布2026年智利金融科技全景报告,涵盖该国经济发展、数字经济概况及金融科技生态系统。智利作为拉美金融科技领先市场,在监管沙盒、数字银行和保险科技等领域持续创新发展。

tech_news_cn.title: Cregis Shines at Paris Blockchain Week 2026, Accelerating European Expansion - markets.businessinsider.com
tech_news_cn.description: Cregis participated in Paris Blockchain Week 2026 under the theme of bridging traditional finance and digital assets, accelerating European expansion.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: Cregis亮相2026巴黎区块链周,加速欧洲市场拓展
tech_news_cn.display_title: Cregis亮相2026巴黎区块链周,推动传统金融与数字资产融合
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 数字资产基础设施提供商Cregis在2026巴黎区块链周上表现亮眼,以连接传统金融与数字资产为主题,与监管机构、金融机构和Web3项目共同探讨数字资产与传统金融的融合趋势,加速欧洲市场布局。

tech_news_cn.title: Judo Bank hires ex-Bendigo CIO - iTnews
tech_news_cn.description: Judo Bank has named Nathalie Moss as its chief technology officer, the first time the bank has appointed a dedicated CTO.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: Judo Bank任命前Bendigo CIO为首席技术官
tech_news_cn.display_title: Judo Bank首次任命专职CTO,加强技术战略布局
tech_news_cn.display_desc: 澳大利亚数字银行Judo Bank任命前Bendigo银行CIO Nathalie Moss为首席技术官,这是该行首次设立专职CTO职位。同时,Australia Services推进虚拟桌面整合,Carsales进入AI聊天应用领域,AI遗留系统现代化成为银行业技术转型重点。

tech_news_cn.title: What Fintech Execs can Learn from Jassy's Six Truths for AI - FinTech Magazine
tech_news_cn.description: Andy Jassy shares how AI reinvents customer experiences amid capex surges and capacity crunches. AWS AI-driven revenue run rate exceeded US$15bn in Q1 2026.
tech_news_cn.title_cn: AWS CEO Jassy分享AI六大真理,金融科技高管可借鉴的经验
tech_news_cn.display_title: AWS CEO分享AI六大真理,为金融科技行业指明转型方向
tech_news_cn.display_desc: AWS首席执行官Andy Jassy分享AI重塑客户体验的六大真理。2026年第一季度,AWS AI驱动收入年化运行率突破150亿美元,彰显AI技术的加速渗透。在资本支出激增和算力紧张的背景下,这些经验对金融科技高管具有重要参考价值。
